research_question: How do retrieval-augmented generation systems preserve citation faithfulness in scientific question answering?
queries: retrieval augmented generation citation faithfulness scientific literature
evidence attribution scholarly retrieval augmented generation
hallucinated citations large language models systematic review
inclusion_criteria: Directly evaluates citation correctness, attribution, evidence grounding, or scholarly retrieval
Reports a reproducible method, benchmark, empirical study, systematic review, or foundational theory
exclusion_criteria: Editorials, news, slides, posters, and records without an identifiable scholarly work
